title: Geepas Personal Blender Smoothie Milkshake Maker - Mini Travel Blender for Protein Shakes with 2 Easy to Clean BPA Free Tritan Sports Bottles with Leak-Proof Lids (350W)
features: MINI BLENDER FOR EASY OPERATION - Powerful 350W motor smoothly blends frozen berries and ice with juice and other liquids; blending occurs in the top of the bottle so nothing gathers in the base. Ideal for making sports drinks, protein shakes, healthy fruit and vegetable thick smoothies, milkshakes, frozen juices, protein drinks and more; One-touch blending action with angled stainless-steel blades.

4 LEAF STAINLESS STEEL REMOVABLE BLADES - One-touch blending action delivers perfect results in seconds; Stainless steel blades prevent damage and guarantee the durability of the blender. With 350W Power, the unique blades extract and lock in all of the best nutrients to create beautifully blended smoothies.

CONVENIENT FOR TRAVEL & OUTDOOR, 2 UNBREAKABLE PC BOTTLES - Portable mini blender comes with 2 sports BPA free 600ML and 300ML tritan sports bottles with leak-proof travel lids. You can take the bottle anywhere and enjoy a delicious smoothie, yogurt or protein cocktail, fresh thick juice anytime, working, studying or traveling. The 2 BPA free lightweight bottles fit most car cup holders. Helpful for gym and office people, just within few seconds you can carry fresh smoothie.
description: Product Description 350W POWER 350W power & unique blades lock in nutrients, creating smooth, nutrient-rich smoothies & delicious fresh juices. 2 BPA FREE LIGHTWEIGHT BOTTELS BPA-free lightweight bottles fit most car cup holders, ideal for gym & office use—carry fresh smoothies in seconds. PORTABLE & USER FRIENDLY Enjoy fresh drinks anytime, anywhere with this portable juicer bottle – compact, lightweight, and travel-friendly. CRUSHED ICE MADE EASY Crushes ice & blends juice at the top, preventing buildup in the base for smooth, fresh drinks every time.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎2 DURABLE BOTTLES, BUILT FOR DURABILITY, 4 LEAF STAINLESS STEEL REMOVABLE BLADES, CONVENIENT FOR TRAVEL & OUTDOOR, LEAK PROOF LID, MINI BLENDER FOR EASY OPERATION
